title_1: This degree is valuable for all working professionals with 4+ years of experience seeking general management business skills plus an opportunity to specialise in their domain of interest while still working in their current jobs.
Programme_Highlights:
Career-first curriculumIndustry-focused curriculum: 
This degree’s curriculum follows a research backed & career-first philosophy that enables you to develop general business understanding & specialise in domains of your interest.Theory with application:
You will experience both theoretical knowledge & practical applications. Programme concepts are explained through a combination of readings, real world case studies, classroom interactions, projects and simulations.Core and elective courses:
The degree is divided into 8 terms. The first four terms will focus on building a solid foundation through core courses and projects and the next four terms will allow you to choose elective courses & undertake projects.

Programme_Features:
Data Analytics track
Our Data Analytics track will train you to work with complex data sets, visualise data, evaluate the effectiveness of policies using quantitative techniques and explore the role of machine learning and artificial intelligence in policymaking. It is ideal for those aiming for government, non-profits or consulting careers seeking to utilise data-driven insights for effective policy-making.Policy Design track
Our Policy Design track will allow you to delve deeper into the theory of public policy and develop capacities for program design and evaluation. Ideal for those seeking careers in government, international organisations, NGOs, and consulting firms, this track prepares graduates for roles like policy analyst, program evaluator, and government advisor in public policy, international relations, and social welfare sectors.
